nodes.title: Combat window input resolves
nodes.description: Given a real-time defense window, when ICombatWindowInput reports dodge/parry/counter this frame, then ParryDodgeInputHandler invokes OnDodgePressed/OnParryPressed or TurnManager.ExecuteCounter as appropriate.

nodes.title: Rebinding persistence
nodes.description: Given custom key bindings for dodge/parry/counter, when the player saves settings, then bindings load on next session (future Input Actions asset).
